features.title: List Simulators
features.description: Display all available iOS simulators, including their OS versions, UDIDs, state, and availability.

features.title: Create Simulators
features.description: Quickly create new simulators by selecting the device type and iOS version.

features.title: Boot Simulators
features.description: Start up a simulator by choosing from a list of available devices.

features.title: Take Screenshots
features.description: Capture screenshots from an active simulator.
